# hindclaw_directive (Resource)

Manages a Hindsight directive.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bank_id` (String) Bank identifier.
- `content` (String) Directive content.
- `name` (String) Directive name.

### Optional

- `is_active` (Boolean) Whether the directive is active (default true).
- `priority` (Number) Priority (default 0).
- `tags` (List of String) Tags.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Directive identifier (computed by server).
